---
title: "Evolutionary Game Theory"
description: "Replicator dynamics, ESS, Moran processes, spatial games, co-evolution, and biological applications."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
<span data-topic-count="evolutionary-gt"></span> TUTORIALS
:::

# Evolutionary Game Theory

Replicator dynamics, ESS, Moran processes, spatial games, co-evolution, and biological applications.
